title: Quest Travel Clothes Steamer/Handheld Steam Generator for Garments, Curtains, Furniture & More/Portable, Lightweight, Folding Handle/Removable 130ml Water Tank
features: POWERFUL STEAMER – Remove creases and wrinkles in seconds with this Portable Clothes Steamer. Featuring 1200W of power, and a steam rate of up to 22g per minute, it is fast and convenient, with its 130ml water tank allowing it to be used for over 10 minutes of continuous steam.

EASY OPERATION – Using the steamer is quick and easy; simply add water to the removable tank, and plug the steamer in to heat up. Once ready, it is activated by just one button. Its comfortable grip handle and ergonomic design makes it easy to use at different angles, to ensure you get every crease out.

VARIABLE USES – The steamer’s precision, as well as its beaker and brush attachments, allow it to be used for many differing kinds of materials. Use it to remove creases from cotton, silk, polyester, linen, chiffon, and more.

PORTABLE DESIGN – Use the steamer at home or when travelling, as its foldable handle helps to save space and allow the steamer to neatly fit into a bag or suitcase. Its design is lightweight and compact, measuring just 16 x 10 x 9cm when folded.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page For Various Clothes The steamer is suitable for use with clothes made from cotton, silk, polyester, linen, and more. Refillable Tank The 130ml water tank is easily refilled, and features a lock to ensure it stays in place during use. Brush Head The brushes surrounding the steamer's head help to remove additional debris during steaming. Multi-Surface The steamer is not only suitable for use on clothes, but also on curtains, upholstery, and more. Folding Design Easily take the portable steamer with you when travelling, as it folds to save space in storage. Next page 1 For Various Clothes 2 Refillable Tank 3 Brush Head 4 Multi-Surface 5 Folding Design
